summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with strong analytical and data engineering skills applied to large, real-world datasets. Built SQL-backed data pipelines and normalized relational schemas to store and query model outputs at scale, processed and cleaned messy unstructured datasets scaling training data from hundreds to 10,000+ samples, and developed predictive models combining multiple data sources with rigorous evaluation using cross-validation and held-out test sets. Comfortable managing multiple concurrent projects independently and communicating technical findings clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.

skills.languages: Python, SQL, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: Scikit-learn, XGBoost, PyTorch, TensorFlow, HuggingFace Transformers, NumPy, Pandas, Predictive Modeling, Feature Engineering, Model Evaluation, NLP, LLMs, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), SHAP, Explainable AI, Vector Embeddings
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), AWS, GCP, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
